column8: Friendly People is a comedy. It's my favourite programme.
column9: My friend Michael often comes to play with me. He hasn't got any brothers and sisters.
column10: My sister loves wearing hats. Her hair is brown.
column11: New York is an enormous city. It's where I was born.
column12: This CD is scratched. I only bought it yesterday.
column13: My brother George has got some great shirts! He hates me borrowing his clothes.
column14: Our neighbours have never invited us to dinner. Their house is directly opposite ours.
